_comment: Tick-parameter config for piclock. Defaults shown are ESPCLOCK4 20cm values for direct GPIO drive (3.3V, no clamp). Deploy to /etc/piclock/clock.json. Calibrate reverse with `piclock -test rev` before trusting it. Pulses are software-PWM: a 100us carrier driven high for *_on_us of each 100us (100 = solid pulse, use that if you add a diode clamp). Missing keys keep the built-in default.
